scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('frontend/.next','.next',{recursive:true}); require('fs').cpSync('frontend/public','public',{recursive:true})"
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push && cd ..
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npm run db:seed && cd ..
